specific_question: In Q1 2025, what percentage of Elexion’s home charging stations required software troubleshooting within the first six months of installation?
answer: Internal maintenance records show that 18% of Elexion’s home charging stations reported software troubleshooting issues within the first six months of installation in Q1 2025.
